serverInfo.name: cronulla-tri-club-events
serverInfo.title: Cronulla Triathlon Club Events
serverInfo.description: Browse and search upcoming events for Cronulla Triathlon Club — Sydney's leading triathlon community for swimmers, cyclists, and runners of all levels.

tools.name: get_events_this_week
tools.description: Returns all Cronulla Tri Club events occurring this week (Mon–Sun) in Sydney time.

tools.name: get_events_for_date
tools.description: Returns all events for a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD).

tools.name: search_events
tools.description: Search events by keyword across titles, descriptions, and event type.
